triggers.description: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may exile NICKNAME. If you do, it gains "Whenever a land you control enters, if NICKNAME is exiled, you may put a voyage counter on it. If you don't, return NICKNAME to the battlefield with X +1/+1 counters on it and draw X cards, where X is the number of voyage counters on it."

Whenever a Vehicle you control deals combat damage to a player, that player exiles that many cards from the top of their library. You may play lands from among those cards for as long as they remain exiled.
